title: Thai Stew with Bellflower and Delicate Vegetables
description: A flavorful Thai-inspired stew made with tender bellflower and delicate vegetables.

ingredients.name: delicate vegetables (such as lotus stem or water chestnut)

instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add sliced ginger and onion, cook for 3-4 minutes until softened.
Add sliced bellflower and delicate vegetables, cook for 5 minutes until tender.
Add stew paste and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Pour in coconut milk and vegetable broth, bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Season with fish sauce (if using) and salt.
Serve hot garnished with fresh herbs.
Serve with steamed rice or noodles for a complete meal.
